nasb.text: Jesus answered, “Truly, truly, I say to you, unless one is born of water and the Spirit he cannot enter into the kingdom of God.

esv.text: Jesus answered, “Truly, truly, I say to you, unless one is born of water and the Spirit, he cannot enter the kingdom of God.

cnv.text: 耶穌回答：“我實實在在告訴你，人若不是從水和聖靈生的，就不能進　神的國。

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“我实实在在地告诉你，人如果不是从水和圣灵生的，就不能进上帝的国。

csbs.text: 耶稣回答：“我确确实实地告诉你：一个人如果不是由水和圣灵所生的，就不能进入神的国。
